data.alertName: Suspicious cross-account AssumeRole from new geography

alertInfo.description: User arn:aws:iam::123456789012:user/build-bot assumed role arn:aws:iam::987654321098:role/AdminCrossAccount from 203.0.113.45 (Romania). No prior history of this geography for this principal.

data.alertName: Public S3 bucket created with versioning disabled

alertInfo.description: Bucket s3://acme-marketing-public-2024 was created in account 123456789012 with public-read ACL and versioning disabled. Owner: alice@acme.example.com.

data.alertName: K8s workload making outbound connection to known C2

alertInfo.description: Pod payments-api-7f6 in cluster prod-eks-1 contacted 198.51.100.7:443, a known C2 endpoint.

data.alertName: IAM access key created and used within 60s from new host

alertInfo.description: Access key created for IAM user backup-svc in account 123456789012 and used from a host not seen before.

data.alertName: Cryptominer process detected on production host

alertInfo.description: Process xmrig observed on host i-0abcd1234 in account 123456789012.

data.alertName: GuardDuty: UnauthorizedAccess via Tor exit node

alertInfo.description: Console login from Tor exit node 198.51.100.99 for user bob@acme.example.com.
